issues.description: Action type 'AttachDon' is incorrect. The card text says 'Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards' which means moving/transferring existing rested DON cards, not attaching new DON. Should use 'GiveDon' to transfer rested DON cards from hand/field to target. Additionally, 'AttachDon' typically means attaching DON to a card, not giving rested DON cards.
Count is 2, but text says 'up to 2', indicating variable/optional amount. DSL should reflect this is a choice of 1 or 2, not always 2.
Target allows choosing 1 Character OR Leader, but DSL allows multiple targets. Should be 'ChooseOne' between Leader or one Character, not open choice of multiple.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
